description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every pull request. Use three ubuntu-latest jobs with a Python 3.8 matrix: notebooks1, notebooks2, and docs. For each job, check out the repository, set up Python, cache dependencies, install required packages, and then run specific scripts: test/run_notebook.sh 1 for notebooks1, test/run_notebook.sh 2 for notebooks2, and sphinx-build for docs.
